item.title: Return of the Meme 1680: nests
item.description:
lets get this bread i guess idk
not a meme, but a book i was curious about looking into.
Pippin, to me
Oh, Dreher, you ass
now you know. I want to hold the cute tiny crocodiles.
dresses based off ancestral puebloean pottery patterns
this is why i am not friends with any star wars fans except the ones i'm friends with.
cowbirds are nest parasites.
so glad he got voted out. At least Europe is healing, even if America is currently fucked.
Pippin Tax, book by @AlmostCertainlyNotPickles Today's Message From Pippin: *beep beep I love you* ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Every morning and night I send my adult kids a handful of funny & uplifting memes, dad jokes, warnings about cats, advice, words of encouragement, a theme song of the day, and weird shit. Here’s 50 of the top of the sent pile. Enjoy.
item.description:
Dad advice
Dad advice
Dad advice
Dad advice. This is how you pick me up when I get even more ancient.
Dad advice. This was me as a cadet in ROTC.
I swear I saw that thing in the movie Up.
Beware the cats
Dad advice
Dad advice. This is love.
My son is a graphic designer. I sent this to him and his fiancée.
Beware the cats
Beware the cats
Beware the cats
Beware the cats
Dad advice. You don’t know the ancient ways. I was raised in them. I was born in them. I know eldritch magics so dark, so cheesy…
Dad advice
Beware the cats
Beware the cats
I’m too tired to comment on this post.
item.dc:creator: Wheretheheckisjason

item.title: Dem platform for '28
item.description: Imagine the protests in the streets! Edit: I love the idea of billionaires having to keep their papers on them. Driving around in Ford Pintos dressing like bums so they don't get profiled. "Hey you! ON THE GROUND! Proof of income tax payments and earnings?"

item.title: I'm single again, and that's everyone's problem.
item.description:
Its been a bad week. Come watch me stream: https://www.twitch.tv/fluffnblood
Feel like im in a country song
I hate country
Btw how do you make custom tags?
Asking for a friend.
And not bc i was going to add weird ones...
Anyone else criticize uniforms in media?
Amen birds
Been streaming sonic for short streams adventure was the best mid game. I miss the Dreamcast (and VMUs)
I do have a lot of inch deep mild wide knowledge
Must get in the box
Fuckin A
And there it is.
Cuz I AM. Also stream at 7cst-ISH because theres always something
item.dc:creator: Fluffnblood

item.title: GovBrief Today #461
item.description: Protesters filled the Tennessee and Alabama capitols this week before either state could finish redrawing congressional maps. Last Wednesday the Supreme Court struck down Louisiana's map for relying too heavily on race, and three Southern states walked through that door within seven days. In Tennessee, Republicans refused to hold a hearing in Memphis where the targeted district sits, and called in state troopers when protesters filled the Nashville hearing room. Alabama is trying to throw out a court-ordered map that federal judges said had to stay until 2030. Trump posted Sunday that Republicans could pick up twenty House seats. The fight to undo this won't be won in six months, but the midterms in November can help answer it. Make the margin so big the new lines can't save the people who drew them. I've emailed 7,292 stories over 461 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your name at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com More context, clickable links, data, and pictures on the website: https://go.govbrief.today/260506-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-doxxing [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-may06 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/giuliani-recovery [4] https://go.govbrief.today/prison-sa-cases [5] https://go.govbrief.today/house-lutnick [6] https://go.govbrief.today/epstein-note [7] https://go.govbrief.today/andrews-leak [8] https://go.govbrief.today/ucla-med [9] https://go.govbrief.today/lucas-search [10] https://go.govbrief.today/fulton-ballots [11] https://go.govbrief.today/tn-transparency [12] https://go.govbrief.today/us-military-damage [13] https://go.govbrief.today/descano-probe [14] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-appeal-pause [15] https://go.govbrief.today/detention-appeal [16] https://go.govbrief.today/slow-immigration [17] https://go.govbrief.today/collins-tremor [18] https://go.govbrief.today/gerrymander-protest Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: GenZ vs GenX, how big is the difference ?
item.description: @szugyizsolt (Instagram) @Ankylosaur : Not this Rick-Beato-ass gen-x ragebait shit again. All those Dua Lipa songs are off the same album, "Future Nostalgia", which you might guess from the title is composed of reworkings of elements from classic pop songs. This isn't some dirty secret act of theft, it's the whole concept of the album, and the original artists and songs are credited in the liner notes. And it's more creative than an album of straight covers, which is something relatively common that no one complains about.
item.dc:creator: kayzersosie

item.title: The first Holocaust didn't start with Jews, and neither will the second.
item.description: Source: https://bsky.app/profile/alexpetrovnia.bsky.social/post/3mlbvu5nlhc2g The text "or against Americans anywhere" deserves particular highlighting -- this won't be limited to within the US' borders if it goes into effect. Note that the United States is a member of the Five Eyes organization (alongside Canada, the UK, Australia, and New Zealand) and has extradition treaties with almost every country in the world (and the ones they don't have treaties with are ones where it's already illegal to be trans), to say nothing of their global military infrastructure.
item.dc:creator: VinchVolt

item.title: Always wear a seatbelt
item.description: Good thing the blue truck was empty. And I really hope this isn't AI. It doesn't look like AI to me and several detectors gave it a green light, but you never know these days.
